What lands on the table

The range

A little of everything, all made to order. If you've got a design in mind that isn't here, that's exactly the kind of thing I love — just ask.

01 · Most popular

Custom T-Shirts

Names, teams, quotes, applique, leopard, glitter, bows — soft-press tees built exactly how you picture them, in the colors you want.

02

Hoodies & Crews

Cozy pullovers and crewnecks — perfect for scripture, family names and cold Friday-night bleachers.

03

Custom Hats

Trucker and foam hats with patches, rhinestones and stitched lettering. A shop favorite.

04

School Spirit Wear

Owls, Rattlers, Mustangs and more — spirit tees, hats and hoodies for the whole section. Bulk-friendly for teams, squads and booster clubs.

05

Company & Team

Branded shirts for your business, crew or event — clean, consistent and turned around fast.

06

Family · Faith · Holiday

Mama & grandma sets, faith designs, matching family shirts and every holiday in between — the personal stuff, made personal.

Don't see it?

If you can picture it, I can press it.

Tell me the idea →

Spirit wear for the whole section

Retro drops, applique and glitter for schools across the Brazos Valley and East Texas. Booster clubs and teams — ask about bulk.

Straightforward, start to finish

How a work order runs

Work Order SG · Form No. 001 · Custom Apparel
Step01

The Idea

Tell me what you want — a team, a name, a design in your head. Photos and screenshots more than welcome.

Step02

The Proof

I mock it up and send it over. We tweak until it's right. Nothing gets pressed without your yes.

Step03

The Press

Heat, vinyl, patches — whatever the design needs, pressed by hand and checked one at a time.

Step04

Wear It

Picked up or shipped, usually fast. Then you wear it loud.

the maker at work ✦
Meet the maker

Sylvia

hey — i'm so glad you're here 👋

I'm the hands, and the heart, behind SG Designs TX. When I'm not chasing my three — Skylar, Layla and Davien — I'm at my table turning ideas into shirts, hats and spirit wear people are genuinely proud to wear.

School spirit, company shirts, faith, family, holidays, or that one design stuck in your head — bring it to me. Quick turnaround, quality I stand behind, and a real person on the other end who actually cares how it turns out.

Your vision, my craft — let's make something you'll actually want to wear.

3kids on the crew
100%handmade
24hproofs, most days
∞designs pressed
